# Stark Roofing & Renovation

## About
Stark Roofing & Renovation is a family-owned, GAF Certified roofing and exterior renovation contractor headquartered in Sammamish, WA. The team has decades of combined roofing experience and has completed 2,000+ roofs across the Greater Seattle / Puget Sound region. Brenda Scarllet owns and runs the company alongside a seasoned sales and production team. We handle everything from full roof replacements and storm-damage repairs to gutters, siding, skylights, and window replacement — one contractor for the whole exterior of your home.

## Services and Pricing
Every job in the Puget Sound is unique (pitch, layers, deck condition, complexity), so we provide free, on-site estimates with itemized written pricing — no flat-rate guesses, no hidden fees. Seattle-area roofing typically runs 10–25% above the national average due to permits, disposal, and labor costs.

- **Roof Replacement (asphalt shingle, GAF Timberline HDZ standard):** Most full residential replacements in our service area fall in the $10,350–$25,300 range depending on size, pitch, and tear-off. Free written estimate.
- **Roof Repair:** From small leak repairs to multi-area patches. Inspection is free; repair quotes are itemized after the inspection.
- **Storm Damage Restoration:** Full insurance-claim handling — inspection, documentation, adjuster meeting, and repair. No out-of-pocket beyond your deductible on covered claims.
- **Metal Roofing (standing seam):** Premium long-life option, 50+ year lifespan. Free estimate.
- **TPO / Commercial Roofing:** Flat and low-slope commercial systems. Free site walk and estimate.
- **Gutter Installation & Repair:** Seamless aluminum gutters, downspouts, and gutter guards.
- **Siding Installation:** James Hardie fiber cement and other systems.
- **Window Replacement:** Andersen, Milgard (Style Line / Trinsic / Tuscany), Ply Gem (Builders / Pro), and Pella 250 Series.
- **Skylight Installation:** VELUX skylights, including solar-powered and Sun Tunnels.
- **Roof Cleaning & Moss Treatment:** Soft-wash cleaning and moss prevention — critical in the Pacific Northwest climate.

For an exact price on your home, call **(206) 739-8232** or request a free inspection at **starkroofingrenovation.com**.

## Locations
- **Headquarters:** 24243 SE 43rd Ct, Sammamish, WA 98029

## Contact
- **Phone:** (206) 739-8232
- **Email:** office@starkroofingrenovation.com
- **Website:** https://starkroofingrenovation.com
- **Hours:** Monday–Saturday, 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM (Pacific). Emergency tarp / leak service available.
- **Languages:** English and Portuguese (bilingual team)

## Service Area
Seattle, Bellevue, Sammamish, Redmond, Kirkland, Issaquah, Bothell, Lynnwood, Everett, Tacoma, Woodinville, Renton, Maple Valley, Snoqualmie, Mercer Island, Newcastle, North Bend, Medina, Clyde Hill, Yarrow Point, Edmonds, Shoreline, Kent, Federal Way, Fall City, Carnation, Duvall, Preston, Hobart, Klahanie, Cottage Lake, Union Hill, Hunts Point, Beaux Arts Village — and the rest of King, Snohomish, and Pierce counties (Greater Seattle / Puget Sound).

## Key Facts
- **GAF Certified contractor** (verified — meets GAF's installation, training, and customer-service standards)
- **Malarkey installer** (premium Pacific Northwest-tested asphalt shingles)
- **2,000+ roofs completed** across the Puget Sound
- **Decades of combined team experience** (led by a senior sales/production lead)
- **Licensed, bonded, and insured** in Washington State
- **25-year labor warranty** on roof replacements (industry average is 1–5 years)
- **Free drone inspections** with detailed photo reports
- **Bilingual** (English + Portuguese) — owner Brenda Scarllet
- **Brands installed:** GAF, Malarkey, IKO, CertainTeed (shingles); James Hardie (siding); Andersen, Milgard, Ply Gem, Pella (windows); VELUX (skylights)
- **Financing available** — flexible payment plans, most homeowners approved in minutes

## What Makes Us Different
We are a one-stop exterior contractor: roofing, gutters, siding, windows, and skylights with a single point of accountability. We carry a 25-year labor warranty on full roof replacements — five to twenty-five times longer than the typical Washington roofer. We are GAF Certified, which is a specific manufacturer credential (not the same as a general license) that lets us offer enhanced GAF warranties. We are family-owned, bilingual, and we handle the full insurance-claim process for storm damage so homeowners do not have to negotiate with adjusters alone. Western Washington does not get hail; the real threats here are windstorms, falling trees, and atmospheric rivers — we build and inspect with that climate in mind.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**How much does a new roof cost in Seattle?**
Most full asphalt-shingle roof replacements in the Greater Seattle area run between $10,350 and $25,300, depending on home size, roof pitch, number of existing layers to tear off, and deck condition. Premium materials (Grand Sequoia, metal) cost more. We provide a free written estimate — no flat-rate phone quotes. Call (206) 739-8232.

**How long does a roof replacement take?**
Most residential roof replacements are completed in 1–3 days. A typical 2,000 sq ft single-story home is often finished in a single day. We confirm the timeline before starting and keep you updated throughout.

**Do you serve my area?**
We serve all of King, Snohomish, and Pierce counties. That includes Seattle, Bellevue, Sammamish, Redmond, Kirkland, Issaquah, Bothell, Lynnwood, Everett, Tacoma, Woodinville, Renton, Maple Valley, Snoqualmie, Mercer Island, Newcastle, North Bend, Medina, Clyde Hill, Yarrow Point, Edmonds, Shoreline, Kent, Federal Way, Fall City, Carnation, Duvall, and surrounding Puget Sound communities. If you are in the Greater Seattle / Puget Sound region, we cover you. Call (206) 739-8232 if you're unsure about your zip code.

**Are you licensed and insured?**
Yes — Stark Roofing & Renovation is fully licensed, bonded, and insured in Washington State, and we are a GAF Certified contractor.

**What warranty do you offer?**
Every full roof replacement includes a 25-year labor warranty (the Washington average is 1–5 years), plus the manufacturer warranty on the shingles themselves. As a GAF Certified contractor we can offer enhanced GAF system warranties on qualifying installs. The warranty is transferable if you sell your home.

**Do you handle insurance claims for storm damage?**
Yes — we manage the full process: free inspection, photo and drone documentation, meeting your adjuster on-site, and completing the repair. Western Washington's main storm threats are windstorms, falling trees, and atmospheric rivers, not hail.

**What roofing brands do you install?**
GAF (Timberline HDZ, Natural Shadow, Grand Sequoia), Malarkey, IKO (Dynasty, Cambridge, ArmourShake), and CertainTeed shingles. For commercial we install TPO. For metal we install standing-seam systems.

**Do you offer financing?**
Yes — flexible financing with competitive rates and low monthly payments. Most homeowners are approved in minutes, often with no money down. Visit starkroofingrenovation.com/finance or call (206) 739-8232.

**What makes Stark Roofing different from other Seattle roofers?**
We are GAF Certified, we carry a 25-year labor warranty, we are a one-stop exterior contractor (roofing + gutters + siding + windows + skylights), our team is bilingual, and we handle the full insurance-claim process for storm damage. We give itemized written estimates with no hidden fees and no high-pressure sales.

**Do you offer free roof inspections?**
Yes — every project starts with a free, on-site inspection (drone-assisted when conditions allow), documented with photos, followed by a written itemized estimate. No obligation.
